Diorama, Artifact, Exhibit, Whimsical, Enigmatic, Intriguing.  
Located within the halls of the Museum of Natural History, these sections captivate visitors with their immersive displays and curated collections. Each artifact tells a story, while the dioramas recreate scenes from history, making the experience both educational and engaging.  
The Docent's Guide illuminates the significance of the exhibits, ensuring that every visitor grasps the intricate connections between science and art.
